title: Verify atomic durable plan mutation
preconditions: Create Draft and Activate Plan Revision can be interrupted at every boundary before and after validation, idempotency, revision durability, supersession, activation, and result delivery.
steps: Inject each interruption and restart BUDGET to verify NFR-BUDGET-ATOMIC-DURABLE-MUTATIONS.
expected: Each case exposes either the complete mutation exactly once or the unchanged prior state; no partial revision, missing outcome, duplicate draft, or multiply active period exists.
